name: Pilot Protocol Webhook Receiver
description: Registers POST /pilot-webhook on openclaw's gateway HTTP server so pilot-daemon can deliver inbox/file/trust events as JSON. Each event is appended to ~/.openclaw/workspace/pilot-events.log so the agent loop / heartbeat can surface it the next time it reads workspace.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable receiving without uninstalling the plugin.

path.description: URL path the route binds. Default is /pilot-webhook.

auth.description: Route auth mode passed to registerPluginHttpRoute. Default 'none' is acceptable for loopback-bound gateways; switch to 'bearer' when binding to a non-loopback interface.

logPath.description: Path the plugin appends each received event to. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace/pilot-events.log.

maxBodyBytes.description: Reject any POST body larger than this (defense-in-depth).
